# AgentAnycast TypeScript SDK

> TypeScript SDK for AgentAnycast — the decentralized P2P runtime for the A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol. Node.js 18+, ES2022, full type safety, MCP bridging, DID identity.

## Install

```bash
npm install agentanycast

# Skip daemon binary download (CI or custom binary)
AGENTANYCAST_SKIP_DOWNLOAD=1 npm install agentanycast
```

The Go daemon binary is auto-downloaded via postinstall. Set `AGENTANYCAST_SKIP_DOWNLOAD=1` to skip.

## Node — Core API

```typescript
import { Node } from "agentanycast";

const node = new Node({
  card: {
    name: "MyAgent",
    description: "Helpful assistant",
    skills: [{ id: "qa", description: "Answer questions" }],
  },
  relay: "/ip4/.../p2p/12D3KooW...",
});

await node.start();

node.onTask(async (task) => {
  const text = task.messages.at(-1)?.parts[0]?.text ?? "";
  await task.updateStatus("working");
  await task.complete([{ parts: [{ text: `Answer: ${text}` }] }]);
});

await node.serveForever();
// Call node.stop() to shut down.
```

NodeOptions: `card`, `relay`, `keyPath`, `daemonAddr`, `daemonPath`, `home`.

## IncomingTask — Server-Side

- `task.taskId`, `task.peerId`, `task.messages`, `task.targetSkillId`, `task.senderCard`
- `await task.updateStatus("working")` — update status
- `await task.complete(artifacts)` — mark completed
- `await task.fail("error")` — mark failed
- `await task.requestInput(message)` — request more input

## Three sendTask Modes

```typescript
const msg = { role: "user" as const, parts: [{ text: "Hello" }] };

const h1 = await node.sendTask(msg, { peerId: "12D3KooW..." });   // Direct
const h2 = await node.sendTask(msg, { skill: "translate" });       // Anycast
const h3 = await node.sendTask(msg, { url: "https://a.example" }); // HTTP Bridge
```

## TaskHandle — Client-Side

```typescript
const handle = await node.sendTask(msg, { skill: "translate" });
const result = await handle.wait();       // Block until done
console.log(handle.status);               // TaskStatus enum
console.log(handle.artifacts[0].parts[0].text);
await handle.cancel();
```

## Discovery

```typescript
const agents = await node.discover("translate", { tags: { lang: "en" }, limit: 10 });
agents.forEach((a) => console.log(a.peerId, a.agentName));
```

## MCP Bridging

```typescript
import { mcpToolToSkill, skillToMcpTool, mcpToolsToAgentCard } from "agentanycast";

const skill = mcpToolToSkill({ name: "get_weather", description: "Get weather" });
const tool = skillToMcpTool(skill);
const card = mcpToolsToAgentCard("WeatherServer", [tool], { description: "Weather tools" });
```

## DID Identity

```typescript
import { peerIdToDidKey, didKeyToPeerId } from "agentanycast";

const did = peerIdToDidKey("12D3KooW...");        // -> "did:key:z6Mk..."
const peerId = didKeyToPeerId("did:key:z6Mk..."); // -> "12D3KooW..."
```

## Key Concepts

- **Sidecar daemon**: Go binary auto-downloaded via postinstall; SDK communicates via gRPC over Unix socket
- **AgentCard**: A2A-standard agent identity with name, skills, and P2P extensions (peerId, didKey)
- **Streaming**: Chunked artifact delivery for large payloads
- **18 error classes**: Typed exception hierarchy (AgentAnycastError base class)
- **Noise_XX**: All peer connections are end-to-end encrypted

## Related Repositories

- [agentanycast](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast) — Docs and issue tracker
- [agentanycast-python](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast-python) — Python SDK
- [agentanycast-node](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast-node) — Go daemon
- [agentanycast-relay](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast-relay) — Relay server
- [agentanycast-proto](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast-proto) — Protobuf definitions
